heading: Repealed. –(40),Oct. 31, 1951, ch. 654, § 1(37)65 Stat. 702
label: 61 to 64 Repealed. –(40),Oct. 31, 1951, ch. 654, § 1(37)65 Stat. 702
notes: Section 61, , , required archives, records and materials relating to Indians of North America to be turned over from Geographical and Geological Survey to Smithsonian Institution for purposes of completion of collection of information and its publication.act Mar. 3, 1879, ch. 182, § 120 Stat. 397

Section 62, , , authorized Secretary of Commerce to transfer instruments of historical value of the Coast and Geodetic Survey [the National Ocean Survey] to Smithsonian Institution.act Aug. 1, 1914, ch. 223, § 138 Stat. 661

Section 63, , , related to transfer, by Secretary of Commerce, of Coast and Geodetic Survey [the National Ocean Survey] instruments of historical value, to educational institutions and museums.act June 5, 1920, ch. 235, § 141 Stat. 930
Section 64, , , related to distribution of specimens of National Museum and Bureau of Fisheries to schools and colleges.act Mar. 3, 1883, ch. 14322 Stat. 629
